meaning: n.不测的事,可能性,可能发生的事
examples: We were prepared for every eventuality.
The money had been saved for just such an eventuality.
Every eventuality is covered, from running out of gas to needing water.
This eventuality is plausible given that only about 1% of Groupon deal-takers become regular salon clients.
Consumers enter full panic mode, increasing savings against the eventuality of a job loss.
